name: Dried Beef and Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour cream of mushroom soup into a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Add dried beef and water; microwave on high until boiling, about 2 to 3 minutes. Drain excess liquid.
3. Stir in the chopped onion, noodles, milk, additional water, and parsley flakes.
4. Cover and continue microwaving for 10 minutes.
5. Stir again, then cover and microwave until the noodles are tender, approximately 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Mix in the shredded cheddar cheese.
7. Cover and microwave until the cheese is melted, about 2 to 3 minutes.
8. Allow the dish to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
